name: auto-issue
description: Issue automation workflows for implementing GitHub issues and splitting large requirements into executable issue sets.

interface.shortDescription: Implement issues and split large requirements
interface.longDescription: Automated issue workflows for analyzing GitHub issues, planning implementation, TDD development, validation, review, pull request creation, and decomposing large requirements into concrete GitHub issues.
defaultPrompt: Split this large requirement into GitHub issues.
Analyze this issue and create a development plan.
